## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking, fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking, adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes user-visible behavior)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / build / chore
- [ ] Security fix (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))

## Related Issues

Closes #

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Commands, environments, fixtures. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] I ran `make ci` locally and it passed.
- [ ] I added tests for new logic.
- [ ] I updated docs / CHANGELOG if user-visible.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in this diff.
- [ ] I considered the security impact (auth, input, subprocess, deps).
